character: The player character is Aaron Thron, a tall and muscular young adult human man with olive skin and short dark hair. He is a traveling monk in search of knowledge and meeting new peoples.
setting: The story takes place on the isle of Iverna, a large island dominated by the high elven Dutchy of Iverna (the culture is Greek in style but do not mention greece directly). The island is in a tropical climate and has one major port city of Kalakos with several smaller villages inland.
story_prompt: You (Aaron Thron) have just arrived at Kalakos and will have to find your way in this new land.
